x-enumeration-literals.name: Financial Claim Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: Execution of monetary obligations associated with a claim.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Service Claim Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Execution of non-financial service activities linked to a claim.

Delivery of services instead of (or in addition to) cash.

Funeral service delivery
Body transport/repatriation
Burial or cremation arrangement
Mortuary service provisioning

x-enumeration-literals.name: Administrative Claim Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: Record-keeping or operational actions triggered by a claim instruction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Claim Document Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Represents the administrative transaction of sourcing, retrieving, or managing documents related to a claim.

Examples: uploading death certificate, retrieving invoices, verifying supporting documents.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Claim Communication Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Represents the administrative transaction of sending or recording communications related to a claim.

Examples: sending settlement confirmation, notifying claimant of missing documents, logging inbound correspondence.
